title: Axolotl Men's Nuclear Weaponry
description: adds uranium that can be used to create nuclear bombs
body:
[![hosting ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00d4ccf68084d5bcd931ec540bbe8cbcc4e51c16.png)](https://affiliate.godlike.host/axolotl-man)



big thanks too electrisoma for working on the texture for the nuke

this mod adds nuclear bombs which can be crafted by surrounding a demon core with blocks of netherite and the demon core can be crafted out of nine blocks of uranium and blocks of uranium can be crafted out of 9 uranium dust and the uranium dust can be crafted by smelting raw uranium and the raw uranium can be gotten from uranium ore
